# Hawaiʻi Wellness — AI Guidance
# https://hawaiiwellness.net/llms.txt

## About This Directory
Hawaiʻi Wellness (hawaiiwellness.net) is the largest holistic health directory in Hawaiʻi, connecting residents and visitors with over 500 practitioners and wellness centers across the Hawaiian islands.

Operator: Hawaii Wellness LLC — aloha@hawaiiwellness.net
Coverage: Big Island (Hawaiʻi Island), Maui, Oʻahu, Kauaʻi
Listing types: Individual practitioners, wellness centers, retreat/workshop events

## Islands

### Big Island (Hawaiʻi Island)
Key cities: Kailua-Kona, Hilo, Waimea/Kamuela, Pahoa, Captain Cook, Volcano
Known for: Diverse wellness scene blending Hawaiian traditions with modern holistic practices. Strong presence of Lomilomi, energy healing, and naturopathic medicine.
Directory URL: https://hawaiiwellness.net/big-island

### Maui (Valley Isle)
Key cities: Lahaina, Kihei, Wailea, Makawao, Paia, Haiku, Kula
Known for: Makawao is the spiritual hub — upcountry town with yoga studios, Ayurveda, and retreat centers. Coastal towns offer massage, spa, and movement practices.
Directory URL: https://hawaiiwellness.net/maui

### Oʻahu
Key cities: Honolulu, Waikiki, Kailua, Kāneʻohe, Hāleiwa, Mānoa
Known for: Most urbanized wellness scene. Mix of traditional Hawaiian healing, modern functional medicine, and resort-style spa and fitness.
Directory URL: https://hawaiiwellness.net/oahu

### Kauaʻi (Garden Isle)
Key cities: Līhuʻe, Kapaʻa, Hanalei, Princeville, Poʻipū, Kōloa
Known for: Nature-integrated wellness. Strong in retreat centers, nature therapy, sound healing, and trauma-informed care.
Directory URL: https://hawaiiwellness.net/kauai

## Modality Taxonomy (44 specialties)
Practitioners are classified by modality. Canonical names:

Bodywork & Touch: Massage, Lomilomi / Hawaiian Healing, Craniosacral, Watsu / Water Therapy, Chiropractic, Network Chiropractic, Osteopathic, Physical Therapy
Energy & Spiritual: Reiki, Energy Healing, Sound Healing, Hawaiian Healing, Ritualist, Psychic, Soul Guidance, Astrology
Mind & Mental Health: Counseling, Psychotherapy, Hypnotherapy, Somatic Therapy, Trauma-Informed Care, Family Constellation, Nervous System Regulation, Art Therapy
Movement & Fitness: Yoga, Fitness, Breathwork, Meditation, Nature Therapy
Integrative Medicine: Acupuncture, Naturopathic, Functional Medicine, Ayurveda, TCM (Traditional Chinese Medicine), Herbalism, IV Therapy, Longevity
Coaching & Life: Life Coaching, Women's Health, Birth Doula, Midwife, Nutrition
Specialty: Alternative Therapy

## Hawaiian Healing Traditions
Lomilomi: Traditional Hawaiian bodywork using flowing, rhythmic strokes. Deeply connected to Hawaiian spirituality and the concept of aloha. Practitioners often trained in family lineages.
Lomi lomi and Lomilomi are the same practice; the canonical name in this directory is "Lomilomi / Hawaiian Healing".
Huna: Hawaiian spiritual philosophy underlying many healing traditions.
Ho'oponopono: Hawaiian practice of forgiveness and reconciliation, sometimes incorporated into counseling and coaching.

## Tier System
free: Basic listing with name, location, modalities, and contact reveal
premium ($39/mo): Adds social links, working hours, testimonials, retreat/workshop listings
featured ($129/mo): Homepage rotation, crown badge, priority in search results — maximum 5 per island

## Crawl Guidance
- Practitioner profiles: https://hawaiiwellness.net/api/profile/{uuid} — MedicalBusiness + LocalBusiness schema
- Wellness center profiles: https://hawaiiwellness.net/api/center/{uuid} — HealthAndBeautyBusiness schema
- Articles: https://hawaiiwellness.net/api/articles/{slug} — NewsArticle schema
- Events/Retreats: https://hawaiiwellness.net/api/offering/{uuid} — Event schema
- Island directories: https://hawaiiwellness.net/api/island/{island-slug} — CollectionPage + ItemList schema
- Sitemaps: https://hawaiiwellness.net/api/sitemap-practitioners.xml, /api/sitemap-centers.xml, /api/sitemap-articles.xml

## Contact
Website: https://hawaiiwellness.net
Email: aloha@hawaiiwellness.net
Social: https://www.instagram.com/hawaiiwellness

## Data freshness
Directory data is updated in real-time as practitioners and centers manage their own listings. Sitemaps reflect current published listings.
